# Requirements

## Validated
- ✓ Display paginated records in a React AG Grid table.
- ✓ Provide a mock paginated JSON API at `/api/records` from the backend.
- ✓ Show an actions menu and temporary snackbar notification in each table row.
- ✓ Use TypeScript for both frontend and backend code.

## Active
- [ ] Add robust error handling for frontend API failures.
- [ ] Externalize backend base URL into environment configuration or proxy.
- [ ] Add unit and integration tests for frontend components and backend API logic.
- [ ] Improve local developer setup documentation and root-level startup instructions.
- [ ] Evaluate root workspace package management for combined frontend/backend development.

## Out of Scope
- Authentication/user accounts — this phase focuses on data display and API integration.
- Persistent storage or production database support.
- Production deployment automation.
